name: ExtensionObservation_ReferenceRange_NormalValue
title: R5: Normal value, if relevant (new)
purpose:
This extension is part of the cross-version definitions generated to enable use of the
element `Observation.referenceRange.normalValue` as defined in FHIR R5
in FHIR R4.

The source element is defined as:
`Observation.referenceRange.normalValue` 0..1 `CodeableConcept`

Across FHIR versions, the element set has been mapped as:
*  R5: `Observation.referenceRange.normalValue` 0..1 `CodeableConcept`

Following are the generation technical comments:
Element `Observation.referenceRange.normalValue` has a context of Observation.referenceRange based on following the parent source element upwards and mapping to `Observation`.
Element `Observation.referenceRange.normalValue` has no mapping targets in FHIR R4. Typically, this is because the element has been added (is a new element).

element.comment:
Element `Observation.referenceRange.normalValue` has a context of Observation.referenceRange based on following the parent source element upwards and mapping to `Observation`.
Element `Observation.referenceRange.normalValue` has no mapping targets in FHIR R4. Typically, this is because the element has been added (is a new element).

element.definition: The value of the normal value of the reference range.

binding.description: Codes identifying the normal value of the observation.
